name: SurPro 20-30" Magnesium Double Sided Stilt
description_full:
## Elevate Your Workflow with SurPro S2 Precision Stilts

Experience the pinnacle of professional-grade stability with the SurPro S2 Magnesium Double-Sided Stilts. Engineered for the demanding drywall contractor, these stilts redefine job-site efficiency by minimizing fatigue and maximizing balance. By utilizing a sophisticated double-sided pole architecture, the S2 series provides a rock-solid foundation that allows you to maneuver with confidence, whether you are hanging board, taping, or finishing ceilings.

## Unmatched Comfort and Structural Integrity

Designed to withstand the rigors of daily heavy-duty use, the S2 features a lightweight yet incredibly durable magnesium-alloy frame. The innovative 360-degree wraparound leg bands move in harmony with your natural gait, eliminating the pressure points common in traditional single-pole designs. With a fully customizable fit—including adjustable calf height, footbed length, and lean tension—these stilts adapt to your specific biomechanics, ensuring you remain productive from the first hour to the last.

## Key Features

- **Interlock Safety System:** Patented redundancy technology provides peace of mind by securing all critical stress points during operation.
- **Hex-Extruded Frame:** The unique hexagonal geometry offers superior structural rigidity while maintaining a lightweight profile for all-day wear.
- **Double-Clamshell Design:** Enhances lateral stability and prevents the twisting motion often found in standard stilts, ensuring a consistent, balanced stance.
- **Precision Adjustability:** Features comprehensive customization for leg band positioning, footplate length, and forward/backward lean tension.
- **High-Traction Soles:** Industrial-grade, non-marking rubber soles deliver exceptional grip on both residential and commercial flooring surfaces.

## Technical Specifications

| Specification | Detail |
| :--- | :--- |
| Brand | SurPro |
| Model | S2 Magnesium Double Sided |
| SKU | SURS2M2030 |
| Height Range | 20" - 30" |
| Max Load Capacity | 225 lbs (per pair) |
| Frame Material | Magnesium Alloy |
| Safety System | Interlock Enhanced Safety System |
| Sole Type | Non-marking, High-Grip Rubber |
description_short: SurPro set the bar and then broke it with the invention of double-sided drywall stilts. The newly updated SurPro S2 maximizes everyday performance by further elevating your comfort and stability.

name: SurPro Foot Plate Kit
description_full:
## Elevate Your Stability and Control

Experience superior balance and confidence while working at height with the SurPro Foot Plate Kit. By increasing the surface area, SurPro ensures a more secure stance, reducing fatigue and enhancing your overall control during extended periods of use.

## Versatile Mounting for Custom Security

What sets the SurPro system apart is its innovative, dual-position arch strap configuration. Beyond the standard top-mounted setup, these plates feature a secondary mounting point located behind the heel. This unique design locks your foot into place, preventing slippage and providing a locked-in feel that traditional plates simply cannot match. Built with high-strength, reinforced geometry, these plates are designed to withstand the rigors of daily job site abuse while maintaining structural integrity.

## Key Features

- **Oversized Foot Bed:** A wider surface area improves weight distribution and provides a more stable foundation for users of all sizes.
- **Dual-Position Arch Straps:** Choose between traditional top-mounting or the secure heel-locking position for enhanced stability.
- **Professional-Grade Durability:** Crafted with advanced, high-impact geometry to ensure long-term performance in demanding environments.
- **SurPro Exclusive:** Proprietary design elements engineered specifically to outperform standard industry alternatives.
- **Universal Compatibility:** Designed to integrate seamlessly with your existing stilts for an immediate upgrade in safety and comfort.
